title: Ferry to Hong Kong
writer: Vernon Harris, Lewis Gilbert, Max Catto
actors: Curd Jürgens, Orson Welles, Sylvia Syms
plot: Mark Conrad, a habitual drunk and troublemaker with a shady past, is expelled by Hong Kong police after one too many bar fights. He's sent to Macao on the Fa Tsan, a ferry owned by Captain Hart. Conrad's papers are out of order an...
